issues.description: AttachDon action missing condition to filter for rested DON!! cards. Card text specifies 'Give up to 1 rested DON!! card' but DSL has no condition checking card state. Also missing type filter for 'Whitebeard Pirates'.

Target scope 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' is incomplete. Card text specifies Leader with type including 'Whitebeard Pirates' OR Character with type including 'Whitebeard Pirates'. Current target doesn't restrict by type.
